name: python3-oscrypto
title: python3-oscrypto
description:
cryptography library for Python
TLS (SSL) sockets, key generation, encryption, decryption, signing,
verification and KDFs using the OS crypto libraries. Does not require a
compiler, and relies on the OS for patching. Works on Windows, OS X and
Linux/BSD.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-oscrypto because cryptography library for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-oscrypto as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-oscrypto with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-oscrypto --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
